taxonomy: Ephippiorhynchium polycephalum is a genus of ferns in the family Hymenophyllaceae. This genus is part of the larger group of ferns known as the hymenophyllalean filmy ferns. The Hymenophyllaceae family consists of approximately 700 species of ferns, which are distributed across the globe, primarily in tropical and subtropical regions. The classification of Ephippiorhynchium polycephalum places it within the division Pteridophyta, which includes all ferns and their allies. The exact species classification is still being studied and may be subject to change as new research emerges.
